'''1138''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] based on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Droon]].<ref name="Shadow Stalker" />
